alternateName: A Versatile Dataset for Resume Parsing, Candidate Profiling, and Job Matching

distribution.name: archive.zip
distribution.description: Archive containing all the contents of the Resume Dataset dataset

distribution.name: resume_data.csv
distribution.description:
- **Filename:** `resume_data.csv`  
- **Format:** CSV (Comma-Separated Values)  
- **Size:** 17 MB
- **Number of Columns:** 35  
- **Number of Rows:** 9544

field.name: address
field.description: Candidate's address (if available).

field.name: career_objective
field.description: A brief summary of the candidate's career goals or objectives.

field.name: skills
field.description: List of skills possessed by the candidate (e.g., technical and soft skills)

field.name: educational_institution_name
field.description: Names of educational institutions attended by the candidate.

field.name: degree_names
field.description: Degrees obtained by the candidate (e.g., B.Tech, MBA).

field.name: passing_years
field.description: Year(s) of graduation or program completion.

field.name: educational_results
field.description: Results or grades achieved in the educational qualifications, such as GPA, percentage, or division.

field.name: result_types
field.description: The format or type of the educational results, such as GPA, percentage, or classification (e.g., Distinction).

field.name: major_field_of_studies
field.description: The main fields or subjects studied during the candidate’s education (e.g., Computer Science, Mathematics).

field.name: professional_company_names
field.description: Names of the companies or organizations where the candidate has worked professionally.

field.name: company_urls
field.description: RLs or websites of the professional companies mentioned by the candidate.

field.name: start_dates
field.description: The start dates of the candidate's employment or internships in various companies.

field.name: end_dates
field.description: The end dates of the candidate's employment or internships in various companies.

field.name: related_skils_in_job
field.description: A list of skills relevant to the candidate's job roles, as mentioned in their professional experience.

field.name: positions
field.description: The job positions or designations held by the candidate in their professional career.

field.name: locations
field.description: Locations or cities where the candidate has worked in various roles.

field.name: responsibilities
field.description: A description of the responsibilities and duties performed by the candidate in their job roles.

field.name: extra_curricular_activity_types
field.description: Types of extracurricular activities participated in by the candidate, such as leadership roles, volunteering, or sports.

field.name: extra_curricular_organization_names
field.description: Names of organizations associated with the candidate's extracurricular activities.

field.name: extra_curricular_organization_links
field.description: Links to websites or references related to the organizations involved in extracurricular activities.

field.name: role_positions
field.description: Specific roles held by the candidate in extracurricular activities or volunteer programs.

field.name: languages
field.description: A list of languages known by the candidate.

field.name: proficiency_levels
field.description: The level of proficiency in the languages mentioned (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Fluent).

field.name: certification_providers
field.description: Organizations or institutions that issued certifications obtained by the candidate.

field.name: certification_skills
field.description: Skills or areas of expertise acquired through certifications (e.g., Data Science, AWS).

field.name: online_links
field.description: Links to the candidate's online profiles, portfolios, or other relevant resources (e.g., LinkedIn, GitHub).

field.name: issue_dates
field.description: Dates when certifications or credentials were issued.

field.name: expiry_dates
field.description: Expiration dates of certifications, if applicable.

field.name: ﻿job_position_name
field.description: Specific job positions targeted by the candidate, as mentioned in the resume.

field.name: educationaL_requirements
field.description: Educational qualifications required for the job positions listed in the resume.

field.name: experiencere_requirement
field.description: Minimum experience required for the job positions listed in the resume.

field.name: age_requirement
field.description: Any age restrictions or requirements mentioned for specific job roles.

field.name: responsibilities.1
field.description: Additional or alternate descriptions of responsibilities associated with job roles.

field.name: skills_required
field.description: Skills explicitly required for the job positions listed in the resume.

field.name: matched_score
field.description: A numerical score that indicates the level of match between the candidate's profile and a specific job position, typically computed algorithmically.

recordSet.name: resume_data.csv
recordSet.description:
- **Filename:** `resume_data.csv`  
- **Format:** CSV (Comma-Separated Values)  
- **Size:** 17 MB
- **Number of Columns:** 35  
- **Number of Rows:** 9544

keywords: subject > science and technology > computer science
name: Resume Dataset
description:
This dataset, curated and processed by **Neuralframe AI**, serves as a comprehensive resource for resume parsing, candidate profiling, and job matching applications. It includes structured information on career objectives, skills, education, work experience, certifications, and other relevant details. The data has been collected from both open-source platforms and Neuralframe AI's proprietary sources, ensuring all data is obtained with explicit consent.  

The dataset was first utilized in the **Datathon Competition at Bitfest 2025**, providing participants with a practical dataset to develop and refine resume parsing algorithms and candidate evaluation systems.

Feel free to explore it, and if you find it helpful or interesting, an upvote would be appreciated!


Thank you.
